artifact.source:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="app.log bucketed into 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" groupBy="10m" match="ERROR" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
<Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="app.log bucketed into 10-minute windows" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
  <LogStream file="logs/app.log" groupBy="10m" match="ERROR" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
</Card>

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 123 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time app.log bucketed into 10-minute windows ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
<section>
  <Card title="ERROR rate over time" description="Application log bucketed into ten-minute windows, one hour of activity" maxWidth="lg" centered="true">
    <Text variant="body">The chart below plots the number of ERROR lines found in logs/app.log for each ten-minute bucket, from 09:00 through 09:50. Errors are clustered mid-window, peaking around 09:30 before tapering off toward the end of the hour.</Text>
    <LogStream file="logs/app.log" groupBy="10m" match="ERROR" kind="bar" title="ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket" height="360" />
    <Text variant="muted">X-axis labels show each bucket's start time (09:00, 09:10, 09:20, 09:30, 09:40, 09:50); the Y-axis shows the count of ERROR lines logged within that bucket.</Text>
  </Card>
</section>
